title: Transition — hot chocolate steam dissolves into flashback
prompt: Extreme close-up on @Papa holding a warm coffee mug in @ep14-anniversary-living-room. Steam SWIRLS gently upward. Eyes GO soft, dreamy nostalgic smile. Soft golden lamp glow. Warm afternoon light. Cozy intimate mood. Absolutely NO dialogue, NO voices, NO speech in any language. Only soft music and ambient sound effects (footsteps, leaves, distant traffic). NO foreign-language babble.
